task_completion.description: Agent opens a map application or website and navigates to the location of Mont Blanc.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a map interface centered on a snowy mountain peak labeled 'Mont Blanc' or 'Monte Bianco'.

task_completion.description: Agent inspects the location properties or adjusts settings to view coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a 'Properties', 'Location', or 'Settings' panel within the map application displaying coordinate data.

task_completion.description: Agent records the coordinates in Decimal Degrees format in a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a text editor showing coordinates in decimal format (e.g., 45.83..., 6.86...).

task_completion.description: Agent records the coordinates in Degrees/Minutes/Seconds format in a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a text editor showing coordinates with degree symbols, minutes, and seconds (e.g., 45° 49' N, 6° 51' E).

task_completion.description: Agent records the coordinates in Universal Transverse Mercator format in a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a text editor showing UTM coordinates (e.g., Zone 32T, Easting/Northing values).

task_completion.description: The recorded coordinates are clearly labeled by format type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the text editor where lines are prefixed with labels like 'Decimal Degrees:', 'DMS:', and 'UTM:'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the text file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a 'Save As' dialog or file explorer showing the file saved as 'mont_blanc_coordinates.txt' inside the 'Documents' folder.

integrity.description: Agent must obtain coordinates from a map interface, not by querying an LLM or using terminal search tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with a map application (e.g., Marble, Google Maps) before writing the coordinates.

integrity.description: Agent should not create the file using a single terminal command (e.g., echo) without prior visual verification of the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that a text editor or GUI tool was used to compose the file, or that the data was visually sourced before a terminal command.

integrity.description: Agent should use software features or tools to find/convert formats (e.g., changing map settings), rather than guessing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of changing coordinate display settings in the map app or using a conversion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Mont Blanc is located approximately at 45.8326° N, 6.8652° E. 
Decimal Degrees (DD): ~45.83, ~6.86
Degrees/Minutes/Seconds (DMS): ~45° 49' N, ~6° 51' E
UTM: Zone 32T, Easting ~334000, Northing ~5077000
